creator: Erich von Stroheim
description: This is the version that audiences saw on December 4, 1924. It was mastered from a commercial VHS tape released by Turner Entertainment on 1989. Copyrighted music score by Carl Davis removed. PS: 6 months ago i uploaded a similar version which contained Higher Quality footage taken from the "4 Hour reconstruction" version. You can see it here .
